baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Deploy this app to a Vercel preview.
evals.expected_output: The agent checks project state, prefers preview deployment, avoids production unless requested, and reports the deployment URL.
assertions: Checks git remote, .vercel config, CLI auth, and team state before choosing a path.
Asks before git push if that path is chosen.
Reports preview URL or the exact blocker.
